backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all game data types (User, World, Lesson, Quest, etc.) and backend logic for a gamified learning platform, including user management, XP/coins/gems economy, multiplayer sessions, skill trees, and purchases.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (frontend screens, game economy UI, RPG visual theme) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for what each page and component does.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes, including chart, sidebar, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Gamified Learning Platform' and mounting the app at the `#root` div via `main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component that sets up TanStack Router with 12 routes, handles Internet Identity authentication state, redirects unauthenticated users, and wraps all pages in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/animations/BossE: Displays a full-screen boss battle entrance animation with a darkening overlay and banner image that auto-dismisses after 3 seconds, calling an optional onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/animations/CoinG: Shows a temporary floating UI element displaying earned coins and/or gems with bounce animations, auto-dismissing after 1.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/animations/Level: Renders a full-screen level-up celebration overlay with confetti, animated text, and the new level number, dismissible by tap or after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/components/animations/XPGai: Displays a brief floating '+XP' indicator with a float-up animation that auto-dismisses after 1.2 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Persistent bottom navigation bar rendering 9 icon+label nav items with active-state gold highlighting and drop-shadow effects using TanStack Router's navigate and location hooks.
frontend/src/components/CoinGemHeader.ts: Header widget that fetches and displays the current user's coin and gem balances as styled pill badges with icon images, shown persistently across all authenticated screens.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component rendering a sticky RPG-themed header with EduQuest branding and CoinGemHeader, a scrollable main content area via Outlet, and BottomNavigation—all hidden on login and onboarding screens.
frontend/src/components/RPGButton.tsx: Reusable RPG-styled button component supporting four color variants (gold, emerald, crimson, navy), three sizes, and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, worlds, lessons, and skill trees.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the RPG jewel-tone design system with CSS custom properties, Tailwind layers, and reusable component classes for buttons, cards, and glow effects.
frontend/src/lib/gameData.ts: Defines game data types and constants including question/lesson interfaces, world themes, difficulty/subject labels, and sample questions organized by subject and difficulty level.
frontend/src/lib/userStore.ts: Provides simple localStorage utilities to save, load, and clear a persistent user ID across sessions.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AITutorPage.tsx: AI tutor chat page with rule-based responses categorized by topic (math, english, hints, encouragement), displaying tutor recommendations and allowing navigation to suggested lessons.
frontend/src/pages/DailyQuestsPage.tsx: Daily quests page that lists active quests with rewards, time remaining, and completion status, allowing users to mark quests complete with XP/coin reward animations.
frontend/src/pages/LeaderboardPage.tsx: Leaderboard page that merges the current user's data with placeholder entries, sorts by XP, and displays the top 10 ranked players with badges and avatars.
frontend/src/pages/LessonPage.tsx: Interactive lesson page that walks users through questions for a given world, handles answer validation, hints, boss battle animations, score recording, and progression between lessons.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the EduQuest login landing page with a starfield background, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button using the RPGButton component.
frontend/src/pages/MultiplayerPage.tsx: Implements a multiplayer battle page where users can create or join challenge sessions, answer timed math questions, and submit results via backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Multi-step onboarding flow (welcome, avatar selection, details) that creates a new user profile and saves it to the backend before navigating to the world map.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the user's profile including avatar, level, XP progress, subject progress, achievements, and purchased costumes, with a logout option.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page that lists purchasable hint packs, avatar costumes, and world skins, handling coin/gem balance checks and purchase mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/SkillTreePage.tsx: Renders a skill tree UI organized by subject tabs, displaying skill nodes as cards with locked/available/unlocked states and allowing users to unlock available nodes via an RPG-styled button.
frontend/src/pages/StreakTrackerPage.tsx: Displays the user's daily login streak, milestone progress, and a claim-reward button that triggers a coin/gem animation and toast notification on success.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Shows an interactive world map with Math and English world nodes, locking nodes based on user level, and navigating to the lesson page for a selected world via a dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with dark mode, custom RPG color palette (gold, emerald, crimson, navy, etc.), custom fonts (Fredoka One, Nunito), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for a gamified mobile learning platform with RPG mechanics, listing architectural notes, image requirements, known issues, and existing implemented features.
